title: aeschynanthus littoralis
intro: Aeschynanthus littoralis, also known as the 'Mist Maiden', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Aeschynanthus littoralis has been reported to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
